criteria.reason: Migration and reservation ledger schema are present and idempotent.
Reservation planning service accounts for balance and active reservations.
Disabled execution includes reservation_plan and keeps paid side effects false.
Operator UI renders reservation status and does not claim a charge.
Docs and verification artifacts are present.
